promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong sims intake batch after the engine32 delta-vs-absolute reduction and as the next raw-order cross-axis sampler before the deferred history-scan strip family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact seams needed for second-pass reduction: sampler nonauthority, emitted-name drift, nonuniform descendant continuity, evidence shift away from sampler SIM_IDs, hash-path split, and Axis4 special divergence.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The batch_v3 precursor-lineage reduction was used for the nearest precursor/descendant drift comparison, the sims evidence-boundary reduction was used for the nearest evidence-admission comparison, and the engine32 reduction was used for the nearest adjacent-family separation contrast.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the parent batch explicitly preserves the history-scan strip as the next separate raw-order family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent full_axis_suite intake batch plus the existing batch_v3 precursor-lineage, sims evidence-boundary, and engine32 reductions were sufficient to isolate sampler status, rename drift, nonuniform continuity, evidence shift, hash split, and Axis4 divergence.

candidate_items.name: FULL_AXIS_SUITE_SAMPLER_PRECURSOR_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves full_axis_suite as a cross-axis bridge surface rather than a direct current evidence family.

candidate_items.name: SAMPLER_SIM_ID_TO_DESCENDANT_NAME_DRIFT_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the sampler-to-descendant rename seam across Axis3, Axis4, Axis5, and Axis6.

candidate_items.name: AXIS_SPECIFIC_CONTINUITY_NOT_UNIFORM_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's strongest continuity-ordering packet by keeping closeness uneven and axis-specific.

candidate_items.name: DESCENDANT_TOPLEVEL_EVIDENCE_SHIFT_AWAY_FROM_SAMPLER_SIM_IDS_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the evidence-attention shift from sampler-emitted SIM_IDs to differently named standalone descendants.

candidate_items.name: SAMPLER_HASH_NOT_CURRENT_DESCENDANT_PRODUCER_PATH_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the producer-path caution that current evidenced descendants do not point back to the sampler hash.

candidate_items.name: AXIS4_SPECIAL_DIVERGENCE_AND_DEDICATED_LINEAGE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves Axis4 as the least safe place to flatten sampler-descendant continuity because name, hash lineage, and stored deltas all diverge.

quarantined_items.name: SAMPLER_SIM_IDS_AS_EXACT_CURRENT_DESCENDANT_NAMES
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves rename drift between sampler names and current descendant names.

quarantined_items.name: FULL_AXIS_SUITE_AS_CURRENT_DIRECT_PRODUCER_OF_DESCENDANTS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch preserves non-identical names, hashes, and metrics, so the sampler cannot be treated as the current direct producer path from this evidence alone.

quarantined_items.name: UNIFORM_CONTINUITY_ACROSS_ALL_AXES
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves uneven continuity strength, with closer Axis3 continuity and stronger Axis4, Axis5 FGA, and Axis6 drift.

quarantined_items.name: TOPLEVEL_DESCENDANT_EVIDENCE_AS_SAMPLER_EVIDENCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Top-level evidence for differently named descendants does not directly evidence the sampler’s own emitted SIM_IDs.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS4_DESCENDANT_AS_SIMPLE_SAMPLER_RENAME
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves Axis4 name drift, hash drift, and opposite-sign stored deltas.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable packets: sampler nonauthority, rename drift, nonuniform axis continuity, evidence shift away from sampler SIM_IDs, hash-path split, and Axis4 special divergence.
They preserve full_axis_suite as a bounded precursor bridge without letting descendant evidence or descendant names erase the sampler's own seams.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later sims lineage synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain rename overreads, producer-path overreads, uniformity overreads, evidence-admission overreads, or Axis4 flattening overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the batch_v3 precursor-lineage, sims evidence-boundary, and engine32 reductions as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded full_axis_suite sampler descendant-drift reduction pass.
